# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter the artifact URL', name: 'artifactUrl')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactPath = sh(returnStdout: true, script: "curl -sSL \${params.artifactUrl} -o artifact.tar.gz").trim()
                    echo "Artifact downloaded to: ${artifactPath}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Deploy artifact to production servers
                    sh 'tar -xzf artifact.tar.gz -C /production-folder/'
                    echo "Artifact deployed to production servers"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
